comment.body:
The same monthly note also has this as the downside level. We are above 6289 and unless we get to those levels it means we will not see a strong continued selloff. There might be some profit taking today however unless downside levels are broken hard to imagine today begins the 10% correction. 

"Performing 6197.13 would be the first sign of the beginning downside momentum, and also if the spot cannot go above 6289.56 in the next 30 days window."
